query:
SELECT a.name, a.email, COUNT(m.id) as total_metas
FROM metas m
JOIN alunos a ON a.id = m.alunoId
WHERE m.isActive = 1
GROUP BY a.id, a.name, a.email
ORDER BY a.name;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT a.name, a.email, COUNT(m.id) as total_metas
